params.name: Sumo Wrestler Cert
params.description: Yokozuna is the highest rank among sumo wrestlers. There won't be more than four Yokozuna wrestlers at any one time. A Yokozuna can't be demoted except for special circumstances. The title won't be denied unless the wrestler retires, but the salary will always stay unchanged. Yamato people worship the Yokozuna!
